programme.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programme.sub-title: I Was Afraid of This Thing and I Was Frozen
programme.desc: (M) A father and son stumble across Bigfoot while camping deep in the woods of Michigan. A young woman is stalked by a mysterious presence on a haunted bridge in Georgia.

programme.title: Seatbelt Psychic
programme.sub-title: What I'm Seeing is Very Strange
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Monsterquest
programme.sub-title: Special - Ep 10 Best of: Gators in the City
programme.desc: (MA) Could the most populated metropolis in the country be home to a colony of dangerous alligators? Or are gators in New York only an urban legend?

programme.title: History'S Greatest Mysteries
programme.sub-title: Endurance: The Hunt for Shackleton's Ice Ship
